TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Gerald_Brown, title = Gerald_Brown, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Gerald_Brown} }

S.FORM: Gerald Brown sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1975, ryax sa tay 28 nqu tay 7, Gerald Brown, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

Gerald Brown sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1975, ryax sa tay 28 nqu tay 7, Gerald Brown, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: ɣeral* βrown s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa, wal malaxmis~ɕuq qanij la. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, ɣeral* βrown, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
